name: team-task-manager
description: Full-stack team task manager with role-based access (Admin/Member).

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
